Grades Calculator (Weighted)

This is a weighted grade calculator for your course. Enter estimated grades (0–100) for each category. Blank fields are ignored. You can also adjust category weights based on your syllabus. The calculator can normalize weights if some categories are left blank. Use this tool for planning and estimation, but always refer to your instructor’s official gradebook and syllabus rules for accurate grading information.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Grade Calculator

Enter estimated grades from 0–100. Blank grade fields are ignored.

Syllabus Weights (%)

Tip: Weights can sum to 100%. If some categories are blank, the calculator can normalize them automatically.

Your Estimated Grades (0–100)

Results

Enter grades and click Calculate.

Note: This is an estimate tool for planning. Always follow your instructor’s official gradebook and syllabus rules.

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:


        






  
  Grade Calculator - Weighted
  





Grade Calculator


Enter estimated grades from 0–100. Blank grade fields are ignored.

Tip: Weights can sum to 100%. If some categories are blank, the calculator can normalize them automatically.

Results




Enter grades and click Calculate.






Note: This is an estimate tool for planning. Always follow your instructor’s official gradebook and syllabus rules.
